global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on travel offers.
global.main_message: Promoting special travel fares with a call to action.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: NomadLayer logo
elements.description: A stylized logo for 'NomadLayer' is prominently displayed at the top center, featuring bold typography.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' is positioned next to the logo, drawing attention.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping circular shapes are placed in the center, adding a decorative touch to the ad.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A simple square shape is positioned near the circular shapes, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Book your next trip' is displayed in a bold, large font at the center, emphasizing the main offer.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: The phrase 'Special fares today' is shown below the main headline in a smaller, yet clear font.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Learn more' is located at the bottom center, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' is placed at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, travel offers, special fares
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo and SALE badge are at the top, the headline and body text are centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, Special fares today, NomadLayer SALE, Learn more, UGC
